title: viola × rolandi-bonapartei
intro: Viola × rolandi-bonapartei is a hybrid plant species within the violet genus, resulting from the cross between Viola rostrata and Viola perspicilla. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The extracts of Viola × rolandi-bonapartei have been reported to have potential health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy.
